contentBlocks.original:
सर्वकामदुधे देवी सर्वतीर्थाभिषेचनि ।
पावनि सुरभिश्रेष्ठे देवी तुभ्यं नमोऽस्तु ते ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarvakāmadudhe devī sarvatīrthābhiṣecani .
pāvani surabhiśreṣṭhe devī tubhyaṃ namo'stu te ..
contentBlocks.translation: O giver of the milk of all wishes, giver of the effects of bathing in all holy waters; O the supreme holy Kamadhenu, O goddess, my salutation to you.
contentBlocks.meanings: सर्वकामदुधे (sarvakāmadudhe) – giver of all wishes (sarva:all | kāma:wishes | dudhe:giver of milk); देवी (devī) – goddess; सर्वतीर्थाभिषेचनि (sarvatīrthābhiṣecani) – giver of effects of holy waters (sarva:all | tīrtha:holy waters | abhiṣecani:giver of effects); पावनि (pāvani) – supreme holy; सुरभिश्रेष्ठे (surabhiśreṣṭhe) – supreme holy Kamadhenu (surabhi:Kamadhenu | śreṣṭhe:supreme); देवी (devī) – goddess; तुभ्यं (tubhyaṃ) – to you; नमः (namaḥ) – salutation; अस्तु (astu) – let it be; ते (te) – to you;
